claude.summary: Todos os 5 gates concordam em 17 ACs, 19 testes Pest, verdict approved com zero findings. RBAC (AC-005/006/009/010) testado com role tecnico para 403 em escrita e 200 em leitura. Isolamento de tenant (AC-008/013/014) testado com dois tenants reais e 404 cross-tenant. Validacoes (AC-004/012/015) cobrem payload vazio, regex WhatsApp com 3 cenarios e email-ou-whatsapp obrigatorio. Edge cases AC-007 (409 inativo) e AC-017 (cliente_id ignorado) cobertos. Security: Eloquent parametrizado, sem PII em logs, defense-in-depth tenant_id + global scope.

gpt5.summary: All five gate artifacts for slice 014 are approved with no contradictory evidence: verification and test-audit confirm 17 acceptance criteria and 19 Pest tests, functional-review explicitly marks AC-001 through AC-017 as met with high confidence, RBAC and tenant isolation scenarios are covered with negative and cross-tenant checks, validation and edge cases are covered, and review/security results confirm no SQL injection risk, no PII in logs, and tenant isolation defense-in-depth with zero findings.

reconciliation.final_consensus: Both trails approved independently with all 8 checklist items passing. No reconciliation needed.
